bead.title: ci: enforce SDK and story coverage gates
bead.description:
Context: TP-001 requires autonomous proof across Rust, UI, SDK, and STP traceability. Current CI runs Rust and UI checks but does not run `sdk/typescript` tests/lint or `ui` story coverage. This lets SDK governed-workflow regressions and story-tag drift bypass CI.

In-scope files: `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, `sdk/typescript/package.json` only if script names need normalization, `ui/package.json` only if story coverage command needs normalization.
Out-of-scope: adding new product tests, coverage ratchets, or changing runtime behavior.
Implementation hint: add CI steps for `cd sdk/typescript && npm test -- --run`, `cd sdk/typescript && npm run lint`, and `cd ui && bun run check:story-coverage` using the repo's existing package-manager setup.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cd sdk/typescript && npm test -- --run` passes.
2. `cd sdk/typescript && npm run lint` passes.
3. `cd ui && bun run check:story-coverage` passes.
4. The CI workflow contains explicit jobs or steps for all three commands.
